lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਲਾਇ ਹਰਿ ਸਿਉ ਅਵਰ ਸਗਲ ਵਿਸਾਰਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kar preet man tan laae har siau avar sagal visaar |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Love the Lord, and commit your mind and body to Him; forget everything else. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨ ਨਾਮੁ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਧਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: mere man naam hiradai dhaar |
lines.english: O my mind, enshrine the Naam, the Name of the Lord, within your heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਉ ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਪ੍ਰਾਣ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੇ ਤੂ ਆਪਨ ਆਪੁ ਨਿਵਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: jeeo man tan praan prabh ke too aapan aap nivaar |
lines.english: Soul, mind, body and breath of life belong to God; eliminate your self-conceit.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਜਿ ਆਪੁ ਬਿਨਸੀ ਤਾਪੁ ਰੇਣ ਸਾਧੂ ਥੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: taj aap binasee taap ren saadhoo theeo |
lines.english: Renounce your self-conceit, and the fever shall depart; become the dust of the feet of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰੂ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: maaroo mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Maaroo, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੋਵਿਦ ਭਜੁ ਸਭਿ ਸੁਆਰਥ ਪੂਰੇ ਨਾਨਕ ਕਬਹੁ ਨ ਹਾਰਿ ॥੨॥੪॥੨੭॥
lines.translit: govid bhaj sabh suaarath poore naanak kabahu na haar |2|4|27|
lines.english: Meditate, vibrate on the Lord of the Universe, and all your desires shall be fulfilled; O Nanak, you shall never be defeated. ||2||4||27||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨ ਨਾਮੁ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਪੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: mere man naam amrit peeo |
lines.english: O my mind, drink in the Ambrosial Nectar of the Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸਹਿ ਪਰਾਪਤਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਤੇਰਾ ਕਰਿ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਜਿਸੁ ਦੀਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tiseh paraapat naam teraa kar kripaa jis deeo |1|
lines.english: He alone receives Your Name, Lord, whom You bless with Your Mercy. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਨ ਸਾਦ ਬਿਸਾਰਿ ਹੋਛੇ ਅਮਰੁ ਜੁਗੁ ਜੁਗੁ ਜੀਉ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: aan saad bisaar hochhe amar jug jug jeeo |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Abandon other bland, insipid tastes; become immortal, and live throughout the ages. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਇਕ ਰਸ ਰੰਗ ਨਾਮਾ ਨਾਮਿ ਲਾਗੀ ਲੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: naam ik ras rang naamaa naam laagee leeo |
lines.english: Savor the essence of the One and only Naam; love the Naam, focus and attune yourself to the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੀਤੁ ਸਾਜਨੁ ਸਖਾ ਬੰਧਪੁ ਹਰਿ ਏਕੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਕੀਉ ॥੨॥੫॥੨੮॥
lines.translit: meet saajan sakhaa bandhap har ek naanak keeo |2|5|28|
lines.english: Nanak has made the One Lord his only friend, companion and relative. ||2||5||28||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰੂ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: maaroo mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Maaroo, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਈ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਈਹਾ ਰਾਖੈ ਬੂਝੁ ਬੁਧਿ ਬਿਬੇਕ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: soee suaamee eehaa raakhai boojh budh bibek |1|
lines.english: That Lord and Master protects us here. Understand this in your mind. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਤਿਪਾਲਿ ਮਾਤਾ ਉਦਰਿ ਰਾਖੈ ਲਗਨਿ ਦੇਤ ਨ ਸੇਕ ॥
lines.translit: pratipaal maataa udar raakhai lagan det na sek |
lines.english: He nourishes and preserves mortals in the womb of the mother, so that the fiery heat does not hurt them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨ ਨਾਮ ਕੀ ਕਰਿ ਟੇਕ ॥
lines.translit: mere man naam kee kar ttek |
lines.english: O my mind, take the Support of the Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸਹਿ ਬੂਝੁ ਜਿਨਿ ਤੂ ਕੀਆ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਕਰਣ ਕਾਰਣ ਏਕ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: tiseh boojh jin too keea prabh karan kaaran ek |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Understand the One who created you; the One God is the Cause of causes. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਮਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਸਦਾ ਨਾਨਕ ਤਰੇ ਕਈ ਅਨੇਕ ॥੨॥੬॥੨੯॥
lines.translit: simar har har sadaa naanak tare kee anek |2|6|29|
lines.english: Meditating in remembrance forever on the Lord, Har, Har, O Nanak, countless beings have been saved. ||2||6||29||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚੇਤਿ ਮਨ ਮਹਿ ਤਜਿ ਸਿਆਣਪ ਛੋਡਿ ਸਗਲੇ ਭੇਖ ॥
lines.translit: chet man meh taj siaanap chhodd sagale bhekh |
lines.english: Remember the One Lord in your mind, renounce your clever tricks, and give up all your religious robes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਾ ਭਉਜਲ ਮਾਹਿ ਤੁਲਹੋ ਜਾ ਕੋ ਲਿਖਿਓ ਮਾਥ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: mahaa bhaujal maeh tulaho jaa ko likhio maath |1|
lines.english: In the vast and terrifying world-ocean, he is the raft for those who have such destiny inscribed on their foreheads. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਤਿਤ ਪਾਵਨ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਾ ਕੋ ਅਨਾਥ ਕੋ ਹੈ ਨਾਥੁ ॥
lines.translit: patit paavan naam jaa ko anaath ko hai naath |
lines.english: His Name is the Purifier of sinners; He is the Master of the masterless.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰੂ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: maaroo mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Maaroo, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਣ ਕਾਰਣੁ ਚਿਤਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਦੇ ਕਰਿ ਰਾਖੈ ਹਾਥ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: karan kaaran chit na aavai de kar raakhai haath |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Even if someone does not remember the Lord, the Cause of causes, still, the Lord reaches out with His hand, and saves him. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਡੂਬੇ ਨਾਮ ਬਿਨੁ ਘਨ ਸਾਥ ॥
lines.translit: ddoobe naam bin ghan saath |
lines.english: Without the Naam, the Name of the Lord, huge numbers of companions have drowned.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧਸੰਗਤਿ ਗੁਣ ਉਚਾਰਣ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਪਾਥ ॥
lines.translit: saadhasangat gun uchaaran har naam amrit paath |
lines.english: In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, chant the Glorious Praises of the Lord, and take the Path of the Ambrosial Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਹੁ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਮੁਰਾਰਿ ਮਾਧਉ ਸੁਣਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਜੀਵੈ ਗਾਥ ॥੨॥੭॥੩੦॥
lines.translit: karahu kripaa muraar maadhau sun naanak jeevai gaath |2|7|30|
lines.english: Shower me with Your Mercy, O Lord; listening to Your sermon, Nanak lives. ||2||7||30||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰੂ ਅੰਜੁਲੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ਘਰੁ ੭ ॥
lines.translit: maaroo anjulee mahalaa 5 ghar 7 |
lines.english: Maaroo, Anjulee ~ With Hands Cupped In Prayer, Fifth Mehl, Seventh House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਹੈ ਕੈ ਫੁਰਮਾਇਅੜੈ ਜੀ ਦੇਹੀ ਵਿਚਿ ਜੀਉ ਆਇ ਪਇਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: saahai kai furamaaeiarrai jee dehee vich jeeo aae peaa |1|
lines.english: By the Command of the Dear Lord King, the soul came and entered into the body. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਚ ਧਾਤੁ ਕਰਿ ਪੁਤਲਾ ਕੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: panch dhaat kar putalaa keea |
lines.english: The puppet is made from the five elements.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਜੋਗੁ ਵਿਜੋਗੁ ਧੁਰਹੁ ਹੀ ਹੂਆ ॥
lines.translit: sanjog vijog dhurahu hee hooaa |
lines.english: Union and separation are ordained by the Primal Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਸਿ ਸਾਸਿ ਸਮਾਲੇ ਸੋਈ ਓਥੈ ਖਸਮਿ ਛਡਾਇ ਲਇਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: saas saas samaale soee othai khasam chhaddaae leaa |2|
lines.english: - there, one remembers his Lord and Master with each and every breath, and then he is rescued. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਊਰਧ ਮੁਖ ਮਹਾ ਗੁਬਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: aooradh mukh mahaa gubaare |
lines.english: in that darkness where the body lies face down

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਥੈ ਅਗਨਿ ਭਖੈ ਭੜਹਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: jithai agan bhakhai bharrahaare |
lines.english: In that place, where the fire rages like an oven,

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਸਮੁ ਵਿਸਾਰਿ ਦੁਨੀ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: khasam visaar dunee chit laaeaa |
lines.english: and forgetting his Lord and Master, he attaches his consciousness to the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਚਹੁ ਗਰਭੈ ਨਿਕਲਿ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: vichahu garabhai nikal aaeaa |
lines.english: Then, one comes out from within the womb,

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵੈ ਜਾਇ ਭਵਾਈਐ ਜੋਨੀ ਰਹਣੁ ਨ ਕਿਤਹੀ ਥਾਇ ਭਇਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: aavai jaae bhavaaeeai jonee rehan na kitahee thaae bheaa |3|
lines.english: He comes and goes, and wanders in reincarnation; he cannot remain anywhere. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਹਰਵਾਨਿ ਰਖਿ ਲਇਅਨੁ ਆਪੇ ॥
lines.translit: miharavaan rakh leian aape |
lines.english: The Merciful Lord Himself emancipates.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮੁ ਪਦਾਰਥੁ ਜਿਣਿ ਚਲਿਆ ਨਾਨਕ ਆਇਆ ਸੋ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ਥਿਆ ॥੪॥੧॥੩੧॥
lines.translit: janam padaarath jin chaliaa naanak aaeaa so paravaan thiaa |4|1|31|
lines.english: Those who depart after having been victorious in this priceless human life - O Nanak, their coming into the world is approved. ||4||1||31||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਅ ਜੰਤ ਸਭਿ ਤਿਸ ਕੇ ਥਾਪੇ ॥
lines.translit: jeea jant sabh tis ke thaape |
lines.english: He created and established all beings and creatures.
